title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DTDC

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DTDC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
